name: Barney Park
description: Barney Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Helena, MT. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Capital City Health Club
description: Come play pickleball at Capital City Health Club in Helena, MT! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: East Helena High School Tennis Courts
description: 4 of the 12 courts have lights.  Can't play during school hours or during high school tennis lessons.  After school is out for the summer the courts are available from 7 am till dark.  New courts in great shape.  Lines are a bit hard to see.
open_play_schedule: Best times to play are usually from 8 am till noon

name: Helena Family YMCA
description: Helena Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Helena, MT. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Mountain View Park
description: Mountain View Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Helena, MT. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. Players have access to water.
